step_by_step_thinking:
I agree that FSH is essential for the development of granulosa cells prior to ovulation. One additional point supporting this is that FSH promotes the synthesis of steroidogenic enzymes within these cells, which are vital for producing estrogen—a hormone integral to further follicle maturation. This underscores why FSH must be present first to ensure proper follicular development before any involvement of LH becomes significant.

raw_response:
I agree that FSH is essential for the development of granulosa cells prior to ovulation. One additional point supporting this is that FSH promotes the synthesis of steroidogenic enzymes within these cells, which are vital for producing estrogen—a hormone integral to further follicle maturation. This underscores why FSH must be present first to ensure proper follicular development before any involvement of LH becomes significant.
